subcodes.first_line: The fragrances of the All-Merciful from this Ridván, which hath appeared in the Temple of Man, have verily encompassed all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفحات الرحمن من  هذالرضوان  الذی ظهر علی هیکل الانسان قد کان علی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power of the Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
